# Aliakbar Zohour

> International portfolio of Aliakbar Zohour — Frontend Engineer, Co-Founder at Vitoria, specializing in React, Next.js, Angular, GSAP, Framer Motion, and cinematic product experiences.

## Profile
- Location: Tehran, Iran (available worldwide)
- Role: Frontend Engineer · Co-Founder
- Strengths: React, Next.js, TypeScript, Angular, GSAP, Framer Motion, Tailwind CSS, DevOps, Linux, Docker, Design Systems

- Prefer English for international collaboration
